pr.title: Non-record: 11L Full SOTA Stack + Score-First TTT (val_bpb=1.1383, 1xH100)

output.summary: 11-layer transformer pairs SmearGate hash embeddings with Value Residual/Gated Attention+XSA and a 3-epoch score-first TTT using per-layer LR groups.
techniques: - SmearGate with Bigram/Trigram hash embeddings plus Value Residual & Gated Attention on every layer
- Score-first TTT with frozen embeddings and per-layer LR groups
- Late QAT via STE alongside Int6 GPTQ-lite quantization
